instruction: Four clocks in a row, each with an identical minute-hand pointing right. Rotate ONLY clock-2's minute-hand to point down-left: shift x2 by -10 AND y2 by +10. The other three minute-hands and ALL clock faces must remain pixel-identical.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 72" width="200" height="72">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="200" height="72" fill="white" />
  <g id="clk-1" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(8, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="min-1" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="28" y1="36" x2="38" y2="36" />
  <g id="clk-2" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(56, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="min-2" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="76" y1="36" x2="86" y2="36" />
  <g id="clk-3" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(104, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="min-3" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="124" y1="36" x2="134" y2="36" />
  <g id="clk-4" data-source="heroicons/outline/clock.svg" transform="translate(152, 16) scale(1.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 6v6h4.5m4.5 0a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0Z"/></g>
  <line id="min-4" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="172" y1="36" x2="182" y2="36" />
</svg>
